title: Edge Router
tagline: Sub-millisecond request router for V8 isolates

blocks.text: Acme Cloud's request router was Node.js, allocating per request. Steady-state CPU was 60% router overhead before the user code ran. We rewrote it in Rust.

items: Allocation-free hot path — pre-sized buffers, arena allocators per request
Zero-copy header parsing built on top of httparse
Match table compiled at startup from the routing config — O(1) lookup
WASI shim so user code that targeted the Node runtime kept working

blocks.text: Steady-state CPU dropped 60%, p99 routing latency dropped from ~1.4ms to ~120µs. The migration was fleet-wide over six weeks with no customer-visible regressions.
